item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
that's so cool, how do you even make something like that?
guess they hit the space bar by accident
what am i missing here?
yes indeed it is
i plan on doing this.
as is tradition
why are the earths kissing?
mmm hmm
ugh, that show is always on
fair warning
i kinda want it
wait what
no thank you?
don't talk so loud she's listening
those hats need to make a comeback
please
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Siskel and Ebert's transformation about Jim Carrey
item.description: Have you ever wanted to try D&D but never found a good way to do it or have wanted a little more D&D in your life? I'm part of a great D&D Discord server that is safe, inclusive, and open to veterans and newbies alike. We have text-only games and voice games for all levels of character and player experience, mostly one-shots but some longer campaigns, as well. If you would like to check us out, the link is below. You can come and make whatever character you want, play in games, roleplay in our inn, or just chat out-of-character with likeminded people in a chill and accepting environment. https://discord.gg/forgotten-lands
item.dc:creator: adjacentengels

item.title: 37 days ghouls and goblins
item.description: Source: uselessetymology on Instagram https://www.instagram.com/reel/DAD8vbOJVyK/?igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA== Have you ever wanted to try D&D but never found a good way to do it or have wanted a little more D&D in your life? I'm part of a great D&D Discord server that is safe, inclusive, and open to veterans and newbies alike. We have text-only games and voice games for all levels of character and player experience, mostly one-shots but some longer campaigns, as well. If you would like to check us out, the link is below. You can come and make whatever character you want, play in games, roleplay in our inn, or just chat out-of-character with likeminded people in a chill and accepting environment. https://discord.gg/forgotten-lands

item.title: in PJ vs in Cosplay - Ada Wong cosplay by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/p/DATvipzSzpe https://x.com/YuzuPyonCosplay/status/1838635621189058900 A little side by side of my Ada Wong cosplay transformation! Left side is no make up pj me, right is the final look. I recorded an Ada Wong make up tutorial video, should I post it ? For those curious, this awesome shirt is from Fakku. Men need love too! :) -yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Return of the meme: 1142 (space moonshine)
item.description:
It's morning. I am alive. Let us get our bread
Nikephoros Phokas did NOT like the landed aristocracy of the Eastern Roman Empire in the slightest.
One is maximum cozy, the other is bleh.
The dream. Remember that day I got the cheap liking everyone on Hinge thing? Only one person messaged me back. Out of about 100. And all we've talked about are snakes, and I don't know how to bring this conversation to a date, and honestly, I'm not sure I want to.
I really can't. Trying to motivate myself to get up and go up the mountain, but no luck yet.
Poorly. Very, very poorly.
@SecretHarpy
First Chinese Republic vs Qing Dynasty China
.
That book is a WILD ride.
These three cities made up the Aztec Empire.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: *series of quiet beeps and clicks*
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Socializing a feral kitten
item.description: Scooby acts like she doesn’t like the pets but she does!

item.title: The Man of the Hole. The last of the Tanaru.
item.description: This guy had his whole tribe killed off my mercenaries hired by cattle ranchers. He lived alone until his death in 2022, attacking anyone who came near. "It is not known what language the Man of the Hole spoke, what his people called themselves, or what his name was." Fucking legend. Hope you found your peace. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Man_of_the_Hole
item.dc:creator: baals
